category_title: Conscientious ELL student who views reading as a practical tool
scenario_title: Note-taking and reading in Fitness for Life
minimal_context: Jesus is participating in the health part of his Fitness for Life class, which requires him to read, write, and take notes.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Jesus, it is time for the health part of your Fitness for Life class. Please open your book so we can read and write.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I enjoy playing games in this class, but I do not like the health part.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just get started on the assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't like that I am expected to read and write for this.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep going, and make sure you take notes while I am speaking about the lesson.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I do not like the amount of work I have to do in this class. I don't want to take notes when you are speaking.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Jesus, it is time for the health part of your Fitness for Life class. Please open your book so we can read and write.

STUDENT: I enjoy playing games in this class, but I do not like the health part.

TUTOR: Let's just get started on the assignment.

STUDENT: I don't like that I am expected to read and write for this.

TUTOR: Keep going, and make sure you take notes while I am speaking about the lesson.

STUDENT: I do not like the amount of work I have to do in this class. I don't want to take notes when you are speaking.
